replacements.\"gateway.mode is unset; gateway start w: "gateway.mode 未设置；网关启动将被阻止。"
replacements.`Fix: run ${formatCliCommand(\"openclaw: `修复：运行 ${formatCliCommand("openclaw configure")} 并设置网关模式（local/remote）。`
replacements.`Or set directly: ${formatCliCommand(\"o: `或直接设置：${formatCliCommand("openclaw config set gateway.mode local")}`
replacements.\"Gateway auth is off or missing a token:
"网关认证已关闭或缺少令牌。令牌认证现在是推荐的默认方式（包括本地回环）。",
          "网关认证"
replacements.\"gateway.auth.token and gateway.auth.pa: "gateway.auth.token 和 gateway.auth.password 同时配置但 gateway.auth.mode 未设置。"
replacements.\"Set an explicit mode to avoid ambiguou: "请设置明确的模式以避免认证选择歧义和启动/运行时故障。"
replacements.\"Gateway token is managed via SecretRef: "网关令牌由 SecretRef 管理，当前不可用。"
replacements.\"Doctor will not overwrite gateway.auth: "诊断不会用明文值覆盖 gateway.auth.token。"
replacements.\"Resolve/rotate the external secret sou: "请解决/轮换外部密钥源，然后重新运行诊断。"
replacements.note(\"Gateway token configured.\", \"Ga: note("网关令牌已配置。", "网关认证")
